strategic_objective: Assess stability and contextual dependencies of the destination port distribution shift to understand its reliability and potential shortcut nature.
key_checks: Measure distribution stability of destination port across multiple time windows and attack campaigns
Evaluate correlation of destination port with other network context features to identify confounding factors
Test if destination port alone can act as a shortcut signal with high predictive leverage
success_criteria: Confirmed consistent distributional shift across temporal segments and attack phases
Identified whether destination port correlates strongly with other features that may confound interpretation
Determined if destination port’s predictive power is narrow and shortcut-like or robust and generalizable
